message.content:
@startuml
participant "ProcessLifecycleOwnerInitializer" as PLOI
participant "LifecycleDispatcher" as LD
participant "DispatcherActivityCallback" as DAC
participant "FragmentCallback" as FC
participant "ReportFragment" as RF

PLOI ..> LD : onCreate()
LD ..> DAC : static init()
DAC ..> FC : onActivityCreated
DAC ..> RF : onActivityCreated

@enduml
